name: JetBrains Air
description: An agentic development environment for delegating coding tasks to multiple AI agents and running them concurrently. Built on JetBrains' 26 years of experience, Air integrates tools around agents rather than adding them to code editors, supporting multiple agents (Codex, Claude Agent, Gemini CLI, Junie) with concurrent execution.

name: GitHub Copilot CLI
description: Terminal-native coding agent that brings GitHub Copilot's power to the command line. Features autonomous agentic development with plan/autopilot modes, specialized agents (Explore, Task, Code Review, Plan), multi-model support (Claude, GPT, Gemini), MCP plugins, infinite sessions with repository memory, and cross-session memory.
community_quotes: I'm addicted to the CLI - use it all day at work and even after work hours
Pricing concerns: going from 100% to 13% requests remaining in just a few prompts
Almost like Claude API pricing with the new premium request model
